news.t: Market Valuation, Inflation and Treasury Yields: April 2026

overview.description: The Vanguard Long-Term Treasury ETF (VGLT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund tracks a market value-weighted index of fixed income securities issued by the US Treasury, excluding inflation-protected bonds, with maturities of at least 10 years. VGLT was launched on Nov 19, 2009 and is issued by Vanguard.
infoTable: Bloomberg US Aggregate Government - Treasury - Long

data.title: Treasury Yields Snapshot: May 15, 2026
data.text: The yield on the 10-year note finished May 15, 2026 at 4.59% while the 2-year note ended at 4.09%. This marks the highest level for each since February 2025.

data.title: Treasury Yields Snapshot: May 8, 2026
data.text: The yield on the 10-year note finished May 8, 2026 at 4.38%. Meanwhile, the 2-year note ended at 3.90% and the 30-year yield ended at 4.95%.

data.title: Market Valuation, Inflation and Treasury Yields: April 2026
data.text: Our monthly market valuation updates have long had the same conclusion: US stock indexes are significantly overvalued, which suggests cautious expectations for investment returns.
